barRaise.topFinding: The v0.80.0 far-colony rename was executed as a pure file-move, but two systems identify buildings by their script filename and neither was updated: fog_of_war._vision_for_compute now returns default vision for every tower and housing tier (shipped live), and save_load reloads buildings by the persisted filename so pre-2026-05-29 saves silently drop every renamed building with no version migration. Both share one root: building identity keyed off the filename. The four-cycle version-pill drift closed this run (config/version synced, release.ps1 Step 0 guard shipped) and the canonical-audit chain recovered, but the rename traded a closed process-HIGH for two code-correctness HIGHs.
